subject: Weedle, a small round caterpillar Pokemon with a nose stinger, resting among logs and forest foliage
description: A small round yellow-tan caterpillar creature with a prominent pink stinger on its nose rests among logs and green leafy foliage. Its body is plump and segmented, with a cheerful round face. The setting is warmly lit with earthy browns and greens — logs, bark, and leafy plants surrounding the creature. The mood is gentle and cozy, the creature appearing comfortable in its woodland habitat.
foreground: small round caterpillar creature with nose stinger among logs
background: logs, bark, and green forest foliage
